network.ike.plugin.scaffold.ScaffoldManifest.Foundation

network.ike.plugin.scaffold
 

  • Uses of ScaffoldManifest.Foundation in network.ike.plugin.scaffold

    Methods in network.ike.plugin.scaffold that return ScaffoldManifest.Foundation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ScaffoldManifest.Foundation
    ScaffoldManifest.foundation()
    Returns the value of the foundation record component.
    static ScaffoldManifest.Foundation
    FoundationBaker.latestFoundation(ScaffoldManifest.Foundation baked, CandidateVersionResolver resolver)
    Resolve the latest released versions for every foundation pin and return a ScaffoldManifest.Foundation carrying them — the input snapshot with each version advanced to the latest GA the resolver can see.
    Methods in network.ike.plugin.scaffold with parameters of type ScaffoldManifest.Foundation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<FoundationBaker.Finding>
    FoundationBaker.assess(ScaffoldManifest.Foundation foundation, CandidateVersionResolver resolver)
    Assess every baked foundation pin against the latest GA versions the resolver can see.
    static List<FoundationDriftChecker.Entry>
    FoundationDriftChecker.check(String pomContent, ScaffoldManifest.Foundation foundation)
    Compute the drift between POM content and foundation pins.
    static List<FoundationDriftChecker.Entry>
    FoundationDriftChecker.checkPomFile(Path pomFile, ScaffoldManifest.Foundation foundation)
    Compute the drift between a POM file's parent + properties and the scaffold manifest's foundation: pins.
    static ScaffoldManifest.Foundation
    FoundationBaker.latestFoundation(ScaffoldManifest.Foundation baked, CandidateVersionResolver resolver)
    Resolve the latest released versions for every foundation pin and return a ScaffoldManifest.Foundation carrying them — the input snapshot with each version advanced to the latest GA the resolver can see.
